title: Endrendrum Kadhal
subTitle: Vijay falls in love with Meenu during a business trip and decides to marry her. However, problems arise when Meenu's brother asks him to leave India and settle in Switzerland with her family.

title: Thotti Jaya
subTitle: An orphan named Thotti Jaya is hired by a mobster after he is spotted thrashing a dishonest man. However, his troubles begin when he falls in love with his boss' daughter.

title: Ullathai Allitha
subTitle: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.

title: Ullathai Allitha

title: Vasanthakala Paravai
subTitle: Ravi, a shopkeeper, falls in love with Uma, a student, who belongs to a rich family. But their relationship is tested when Uma's brother decides to intervene and break their bond.

title: April Maadhathil
subTitle: Kathir, a poor young man, and Shweta, a rich young girl, meet in college and fall in love. However, they are unable to confess their feelings to each other.

title: Vaazhkai Chakkaram
subTitle: Inspector Thangavelu convinces his father to reject the dowry system to marry Kalyani. However, a sudden misunderstanding leads their plans and the marriage in an entirely unexpected direction.

title: Alaigal Oivathillai
subTitle: Love blossoms between two individuals, but their differing religious beliefs create various obstacles in their relationship.

title: Anandha Ragam
subTitle: A fisherman arranges his sister's marriage to a wealthy man, against her wishes. He later discovers the groom is very sick, but his realisation comes too late to undo the fateful decision.

title: Muthu
subTitle: Muthu serves as a loyal servant to Raja Malayasimman, a rich landlord. However, things between them turn sour when they both fall in love with the same woman.

title: Muthu
subTitle: Muthu serves as a loyal servant to Raja Malayasimman, a rich landlord. However, things between them turn sour when they both fall in love with the same woman.

title: Suyamvaram
subTitle: Kuselan, a wealthy man with nine children, wishes to see them all married before he passes away. As a result, he offers a large dowry and organises detailed interviews with the chosen suitors.

title: Anna Nagar Mudhal Theru
subTitle: Sivaraman, a desperate unemployed youth, disguises himself as a Gorkha and takes up the job of a watchman. However, he is surprised when his childhood sweetheart moves into the colony he works in.
